overall_cve.notes: April closed; 165 entries published on Apr 30 alone (5720 -> 5885). Below conservative anchor (5651 was the early-projection floor; conservative monthly increase of 500 over Mar 6304 = 6804 produces a tougher number; the 5651 figure used elsewhere comes from a different anchor). Below aggressive low (7151).

may_2026_mtd.notes: Day 1 only; expect early-month to be light pre-Patch Tuesday.

new_in_last_24h: CVE-2026-41940 WebPros cPanel & WHM and WP2 Missing Authentication for Critical Function (CWE-306) — added 2026-04-30. Authentication-bypass in login flow. Classified cms_webapp by classifier (vendor=WebPros, product=cPanel & WHM and WP2). Ransomware: Unknown.
notable_entries: CVE-2026-32202 Microsoft Windows Shell spoofing (2026-04-28, actively exploited)
new_np_di_entries: CVE-2026-41940 (CWE-306 missing-auth in HTTP login flow — NP+DI under widened DI definition; cPanel control panel is HTTP-management surface)

rhel8_errata.notes: April 2026 stack.watch RHSAs unchanged from yesterday's run; next refresh end-of-week.

watch_list_status.summary_per_cve: see config.json exploit_intelligence.cve_status (19 entries: 5 weaponized, 1 functional, 2 PoC, 11 none). last_checked timestamps refreshed to 2026-05-01.

exploit_intelligence.summary: No maturity escalations in 24h. New KEV entry CVE-2026-41940 (cPanel) is not on the watch list and has not been added pending analyst review.

mythos_monitoring.notes: Incremental run: deferred full Google News and vendor advisory sweeps to next full-scan cadence. Yesterday's full sweep covered TheHackerNews/AISLE OpenSSL/UAE National pieces.

np_di_candidates.product: WebPros cPanel & WHM and WP2 (WordPress Squared)
np_di_candidates.np_component: cPanel/WHM authenticated login flow (HTTP control panel)
np_di_candidates.rationale: Strong NP+DI fit under widened DI definition (CWE-306 = Missing Authentication for Critical Function, included in widened DI list 2026-04-23). NP because cPanel/WHM is an HTTP management surface (web-based control panel, the textbook trust-boundary case). KEV-confirmed within 2 days of vendor advisory (cPanel security update 2026-04-28). WP2 (WordPress Squared) shares the codebase. Recommend analyst add to server-side watch list as a hit, since it confirms the NP+DI filter caught it on entry to KEV.

projection_comparison.notes: April finalization: 5885 sits above the 5651 conservative anchor by +234 (+4.1%) but well below 7151 aggressive low. Counter-argument: NVD publication latency means Mythos disclosures from late April would land May 15 - June 15; the volume signal lags the discovery date by 4-8 weeks, so April finals are not the right window to look for a Mythos-driven shock.
